description: Request and track electronic signatures for this document.
empty: No signature requests for this document yet.

requestDialog.title: Request signatures
requestDialog.sequentialHint: Signers must sign one after another in the defined order.
requestDialog.messagePlaceholder: Optional message, e.g. context or instructions …

signArea.title: Your signature is requested
signArea.legalNotice: By clicking "Sign" you provide an electronic signature within the meaning of Art. 25 eIDAS (simple electronic signature). Timestamp, IP address and a cryptographic hash of the document are recorded in a tamper-evident log.

signConfirm.title: Sign document electronically?
signConfirm.body: You are signing the signature request "{title}". This action cannot be undone.

declineDialog.title: Decline signature
declineDialog.reasonPlaceholder: Why are you declining the signature? (required)

verify.valid: Signature valid — hash chain and file integrity verified
verify.fileChanged: File was modified after the request
